title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Kluwer IT Limited
body: "Application number 5089  Applicant Wolters Kluwer (UK) Limited objected to the name used by Kluwer IT Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 28 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Kluwer IT Limited is changed to 15552481, LTD. "
